nasb.text: And Stephen, full of grace and power, was performing great wonders and signs among the people.

esv.text: And Stephen, full of grace and power, was doing great wonders and signs among the people.

cnv.text: 司提反滿有恩惠能力，在民間施行大奇事和神蹟。

ccb.text: 司提凡得到极大的恩典和能力，在百姓中间行了惊人的神迹奇事。

csbs.text: 司提反满有恩惠和能力，在民间行了许多大奇事和神迹。
